title: aethionema grandiflorum subsp. coridifolium
intro: Aethionema grandiflorum subsp. coridifolium, also known as mountain sandwort, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aethionema grandiflorum subsp. coridifolium include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
